creator: guru@unixarea.de
text:
I do not know which version of Ekiga the port compiles tooday. I compiled directly from SVN /ptlib, opal) and from git (Ekiga); the code of detecting the devices /dev/videoX and sound /dev/dspX was Linuxisch and I provided patches to the Ekiga domain; newer version of Ekiga should have them; see also
http://wiki.ekiga.org/index.php/Compile_your_own_SVN_version_of_Ekiga_on_FreeBSD
